input.background: Identify which of these statements are true and which are false.
input.question: Correlation coefficient r quantifies the linear relation between quantitative variables X and Y.

X.value: Not explicitly provided in the question; represents a quantitative variable
X.description: A quantitative variable used to assess its linear relationship with variable Y.

Y.value: Not explicitly provided in the question; represents a quantitative variable
Y.description: A quantitative variable used to assess its linear relationship with variable X.

r.value: Not explicitly provided in the question; represents the correlation coefficient
r.description: The correlation coefficient quantifies the strength and direction of the linear relationship between variables X and Y.
